reference: THUS ACCOMPLISHED HE EXCITED THE ADMIRATION OF EVERY SILLY COQUETTE AND THE ENVY OF EVERY FLUTTERING COXCOMB BUT BY ALL YOUNG GENTLEMEN AND LADIES OF UNDERSTANDING HE WAS HEARTILY DESPISED AS A MERE CIVILIZED MONKEY
text: thus accomplished he excited the admiration of every silly quacket and the envy of every fluttering ocom but by all young gentlemen and ladies of understanding he was heartily despised as a mere civilized monkey
